commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=26f2f559b8353b94a049409cefe4309c0a49a8a3)
commands.review_summary:
The PR gates Copilot registration to full mode and adds metadata-runtime/state facades in the plugin API builder and CLI plugin loader.

PR surface: Source +110. Total +110 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main's Copilot entrypoint dereferences `api.runtime.state.openSyncKeyedStore` while the CLI metadata loader passes an empty runtime object; I did not run the reporter's installed CLI path in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Manual review is needed because the remaining blockers are contributor real-runtime proof and a maintainer decision on whether metadata registration may expose `runtime.state`.

target.title: fix(copilot): guard against undefined runtime.state during cli-metadata registration
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

Fixes #94516: `@openclaw/copilot` crashes at startup with `TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'openSyncKeyedStore')`.

Two-layer fix:

**Layer B (api-builder.ts)** — Universal safety net. All plugins are protected from a bare `{}` runtime regardless of registration path.

**Layer C (copilot/index.ts)** — Mode-aware guard. Copilot is a full-runtime plugin (registers an agent harness), so metadata-only paths (`cli-metadata`, `discovery`, `setup-only`) skip registration. The full gateway activation path will pick it up later. Uses `api.registrationMode !== "full"` (the public SDK contract) instead of checking runtime internals.

**Layer — (loader.ts)** The existing `createMetadataRuntime()` stub provides a real in-memory store for metadata paths that do need `openSyncKeyedStore`.

## Why This Change Was Made

ClawSweeper review (#95229) requested:
- [P1] Gate Copilot registration by `api.registrationMode` instead of `runtime.state` shape
- [P1] "updating api" — ensure `runtime.state` is never undefined

This PR implements both, plus retains the loader-level stub.

## Evidence

`node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run extensions/copilot/index.test.ts`

```
 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  5 passed (5)
```

## Risk checklist

- [x] No new dependencies
- [x] No config surface changes
- [x] No API contract changes
- [x] Copilot tests pass
- [x] Full-runtime failures stay loud (throws clear errors, not silent undefined)
- [x] Additive — existing runtime paths untouched

## Current review state

What is the next action?
- Maintainer review / ClawSweeper re-review

What is still waiting?
- CI (Crabbox) on maintainer approval

Which bot comments were addressed?
- [P2] Gate by `api.registrationMode !== "full"` → done
- [P1] Safe `runtime.state` in `buildPluginApi` → done

## Real behavior proof

**Behavior addressed**: Fix copilot registration crash when `runtime.state` is absent on metadata-only registration paths

**Real setup tested**:
- **Runtime**: Node 24.13.1, Linux x86_64

**Command run**:
```bash
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run extensions/copilot/index.test.ts
```

**After-fix evidence**:
```
Test Files  1 passed (1)
     Tests  5 passed (5)
```

**Observed result**: 5/5 tests pass. The `registrationMode` guard correctly skips non-full paths, and the `safeRuntime` proxy in `buildPluginApi` prevents any future plugin from hitting `undefined` state.

**What was not tested**: Full `openclaw plugins list` with npm-installed copilot (no registry access)
target.author: sunlit-deng

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
